title: Drinfeld modular forms of arbitrary rank, Part II: Comparison with Algebraic Theory
author_string: Dirk Basson, Florian Breuer, Richard Pink
abstract: This is the second of a series of articles providing a foundation for the theory of Drinfeld modular forms of arbitrary rank. In the present part, we compare the analytic theory with the algebraic one that was begun in a paper of the third author. For any arithmetic congruence subgroup and any integral weight we establish an isomorphism between the space of analytic modular forms with the space of algebraic modular forms defined in terms of the Satake compactification. From this we deduce the important result that this space is finite dimensional.
